tasks.label: Start Server
tasks.command: pkill -f 'node server.js' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node server.js

tasks.label: Restart Server

tasks.label: Check MySQL
tasks.command: brew services list 2>/dev/null | grep -i mysql; which mysql 2>/dev/null && mysql --version 2>/dev/null; lsof -i :3306 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo '---done---'

tasks.label: Start MySQL
tasks.command: mysqld_safe --datadir=/opt/anaconda3/var/mysql &

tasks.label: Check MySQL Port
tasks.command: sleep 3 && lsof -i :3306 | head -5; echo 'port check done'; ls /opt/anaconda3/var/mysql 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo 'datadir not found'

tasks.label: Find MySQL Config
tasks.command: cat /opt/anaconda3/etc/my.cnf 2>/dev/null || cat /opt/anaconda3/my.cnf 2>/dev/null || echo 'no config'; find /opt/anaconda3 -name 'mysqld' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3; find /opt/anaconda3 -name '*.pid' 2>/dev/null | head -3

tasks.label: Locate MySQL
tasks.command: find /opt/anaconda3 -name 'mysqld' 2>/dev/null; find /opt/anaconda3/var -maxdepth 2 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -10; find ~ -name 'my.cnf' 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo done

tasks.label: Init MySQL
tasks.command: mkdir -p /opt/anaconda3/var/mysql && mysqld --initialize --user=$(whoami) --datadir=/opt/anaconda3/var/mysql 2>&1 | tee /tmp/mysql_init.log; grep 'temporary password' /tmp/mysql_init.log || echo 'check /tmp/mysql_init.log'

tasks.label: Run MySQL Server
tasks.command: mysqld --datadir=/opt/anaconda3/var/mysql --lc-messages-dir=/opt/anaconda3/share/mysql-8.4/english --pid-file=/opt/anaconda3/var/mysql/mysql.pid --socket=/tmp/mysql.sock &

tasks.label: Verify MySQL Running
tasks.command: sleep 4 && lsof -i :3306 | head -5; echo '---port check---'

tasks.label: Start MySQL v2
tasks.command: mysqld --datadir=/opt/anaconda3/var/mysql --socket=/tmp/mysql.sock --port=3306 2>/tmp/mysqld.log & sleep 5 && cat /tmp/mysqld.log | tail -10; lsof -i :3306 | head -3; echo done

tasks.label: Setup MySQL DB
tasks.command: mysql --socket=/tmp/mysql.sock -u root --password='AZravpkXi8>2' --connect-expired-password -e "ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'Ace1234!'; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS T1; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'Ace'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'Ace1234!'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON T1.* TO 'Ace'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" 2>&1 && echo 'Setup complete!'
